title: pinus montana var. hausmannii
intro: Pinus montana var. hausmannii, also known as the Himalayan white pine, is a coniferous tree species native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pinus montana var. hausmannii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
